subcodes.first_line: He who is forsaken of the world and imprisoned amidst the peoples maketh mention in the Persian tongue with sweetest remembrance, that thou mayest be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: متروک عالم و مسجون بین امم ترا بلسان پارسی احلی ذکر مینماید لتکون من
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @power of prayer, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
